commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cc86c1f492c0d784f59a83a504848ffeb8bdb354)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds RSS/heap pressure backoff to memory-core scheduled dreaming sweeps, treats queued managed heartbeat dreaming as cron work, and updates focused tests and docs for that behavior.

PR surface: Source +92, Tests +365, Docs +2. Total +459 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live repro was established in this review. Source inspection confirms current main has no pressure guard in the cron workspace loop, and the PR/linked issues provide redacted pressure logs, but a live multi-workspace gateway repro is still missing.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer judgment on scheduler compatibility, not a safe standalone ClawSweeper repair lane.
